exchanges.expected: Necesito un jarabe para la tos, por favor.
Sí, aquí tiene la receta de mi doctor.
exchanges.hint: Yes, here is the prescription from my doctor.

exchanges.expected: Tomo una pastilla cada ocho horas.
exchanges.hint: I take one pill every eight hours.

exchanges.expected: No, no soy alérgico a la penicilina.
exchanges.hint: No, I'm not allergic to penicillin.

exchanges.expected: Sí, tengo seguro médico, aquí está mi tarjeta.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I have medical insurance, here is my card.

exchanges.hint: Take one spoonful before going to sleep.
Yes, I understood the instructions perfectly.
